heading: Site
subtitle: A record of notable updates and improvements to this portfolio.

items: Added Cookies Policy, HTML Sitemap, FAQs, Uses, and Case Studies pages
Added custom 404 page with helpful navigation
Activated blog with published engineering articles
Expanded footer with legal and resource links
Redesigned portfolio with i18n support (English, Urdu, Arabic)
Added Services, Privacy Policy, and Terms & Conditions pages
Improved SEO with structured data and sitemap generation
Added sticky action buttons and command palette
Initial portfolio launch with projects, experience, and contact sections
